codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, route implementation, and interview test file. The rewritten suite covers every route and response class required by the feature, keeps the database mocked throughout, and adds useful extra assertions for auth, invalid IDs, and update field-whitelisting without drifting out of scope.

summary: Pass. The feature matches its description: packages/api/src/__tests__/interviews.test.ts exercises interview list/create/detail/update/delete flows plus the analyze missing-API-key error path with mocked DB chains, and I did not find blocking or non-blocking implementation issues.
